text: WarMonitor New AP-NORC poll on Trump Overall: 33% approve, 67% disapprove Republicans: 68% approve, 31% disapprove Independents: 23% approve, 76% disapprove Democrats: 3% approve, 97% disapprove A recent ARG poll showed similar findings, with overall approval at just 31%. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046798218973827177/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 最新 AP-NORC 民调显示特朗普的支持率：总体：33% 支持，67% 不支持；共和党人：68% 支持，31% 不支持；独立人士：23% 支持，76% 不支持；民主党人：3% 支持，97% 不支持。近期的一项 ARG 民调显示了类似的结果，总体支持率仅为 31%。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046798218973827177/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇵🇰 Indian PM Modi on anniversary of Pahalgam attack, in which 26 people were killed and led to a brief armed conflict between India and Pakistan: Remembering the innocent lives lost in the gruesome Pahalgam terror attack on this day last year. They will never be forgotten. My thoughts are also with the bereaved families as they cope with this loss. As a nation, we stand united in grief and resolve. India will never bow to any form of terror. The heinous designs of terrorists will never succeed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇳 🇵🇰 印度总理莫迪在帕哈尔加姆袭击事件周年纪念日发表讲话，该事件造成26人死亡，并导致印度和巴基斯坦之间发生短暂的武装冲突：缅怀去年今日在惨无人道的帕哈尔加姆恐怖袭击中丧生的无辜生命。他们永远不会被遗忘。我也与那些在承受丧亲之痛的家庭同在。作为一个国家，我们团结一致，共同哀悼并坚定决心。印度绝不会向任何形式的恐怖主义低头。恐怖分子的卑劣图谋永远不会得逞。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Dan Eggen, a longtime Washington Post reporter and editor who contributed to three Pulitzer Prize-winning projects and helped lead coverage of the White House, Congress and presidential politics, has died at 60. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046793928490287330/photo/1 tweet

text: 🇮🇷 💬 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 Tehran welcomes Moscow's initiatives to reduce tensions in the Middle East, Iran's ambassador to Tunisia Mir Masoud Khosseinian told TASS. Iran is grateful to Moscow for using its veto power against the UN Security Council resolution on the Strait of Hormuz, he noted. Russia and China could act as guarantors of a possible agreement between Tehran and Washington, Mir Masoud Khosseinian, told TASS. He noted that Iran considers the crisis with the Gulf countries to be temporary. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💬 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 伊朗驻突尼斯大使米尔·马苏德·霍塞尼安（Mir Masoud Khosseinian）告诉塔斯社，德黑兰欢迎莫斯科为缓解中东紧张局势所采取的倡议。他指出，伊朗感谢莫斯科对联合国安理会关于霍尔木兹海峡的决议行使否决权。米尔·马苏德·霍塞尼安告诉塔斯社，俄罗斯和中国可以作为德黑兰与华盛顿之间可能达成的协议的担保人。他指出，伊朗认为与海湾国家的危机是暂时的。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios: U.S. President Trump is considering extending a waiver of the Jones Act to ease domestic oil shipments. The waiver, introduced during the Iran war, allows foreign-flagged vessels to transport fuel between U.S. ports—bypassing the law’s requirement that such shipments be carried on American-built and operated ships. Officials say the measure has significantly increased shipping capacity, with dozens of additional tankers operating and helping reduce transport costs and ease fuel supply pressures and lowers costs for consumers. However critics argue it undermines U.S. maritime industry protections while supporters say it lowers costs for consumers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios：美国总统特朗普正在考虑延长《琼斯法案》的豁免期，以缓解国内石油运输压力。该豁免是在伊朗战争期间引入的，允许悬挂外国旗帜的船只在美国港口之间运输燃料，从而绕过了该法律关于此类运输必须由美国制造和运营的船只承运的要求。官员们表示，该措施显著提高了航运能力，数十艘额外的油轮投入运营，有助于降低运输成本、缓解燃料供应压力并降低消费者成本。然而，批评者认为这削弱了对美国海事行业的保护，而支持者则表示这降低了消费者的成本。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️FBI Director Kash Patel just dropped a $250 MILLION defamation bomb on The Atlantic and reporter Sarah Fitzpatrick. The article claimed “bouts of excessive drinking” and unexplained absences. Patel says it’s “categorically false” and a “fabricated hit…" 🇺🇸 ⚡️ During DOJ Press Conference, Patel Contradicts His Own Atlantic Lawsuit REPORTER: Can you explain the computer login issue? Your lawsuit says you couldn’t log into the system. PATEL: Let’s have a survey. How many of you believe that’s true? ... It’s an absolute lie. It never happened. You are lying. Lawsuit (Paragraph 23): “On April 10, 2026, Director Patel had a routine technical problem logging into a government system, which was quickly fixed.” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）刚刚向《大西洋月刊》和记者莎拉·菲茨帕特里克（Sarah Fitzpatrick）投下了一枚2.5亿美元的诽谤炸弹。该文章声称他有‘酗酒发作’和无法解释的缺勤。帕特尔称这是‘绝对虚假’的，是一次‘捏造的攻击……’” 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 在司法部新闻发布会上，帕特尔反驳了他自己的《大西洋月刊》诉讼案。记者：你能解释一下电脑登录问题吗？你的诉讼说你无法登录系统。帕特尔：我们来做个调查。你们中有多少人相信那是真的？……这绝对是谎言。那从未发生过。你在撒谎。诉讼（第23段）：“2026年4月10日，帕特尔局长在登录政府系统时遇到了一个常规技术问题，该问题很快得到了解决。” 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 WSJ: The U.S. has blocked shipments of U.S. dollars to Iraq in a move aimed at pressuring Baghdad to curb Iran-backed militias operating in the country, arguing that militias have the militias have exploited access to dollars through Iraq's financial system. A shipment worth nearly $500 million in cash from Iraq’s oil revenues held in the United States was halted, marking a significant escalation in financial pressure. Washington has also suspended some military cooperation and counterterrorism funding, linking the measures to continued attacks by pro-Iranian militias on U.S. interests in Iraq and the wider region. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国已阻止向伊拉克运送美元，此举旨在向巴格达施压，要求其遏制在该国活动的伊朗支持的民兵组织，理由是民兵组织利用了通过伊拉克金融系统获取美元的渠道。一笔价值近5亿美元的现金（来自伊拉克在美国持有的石油收入）被扣留，这标志着金融压力显著升级。华盛顿还暂停了部分军事合作和反恐资金，将这些措施与亲伊朗民兵组织持续袭击美国在伊拉克及更广泛地区的利益挂钩。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor A MAGA influencer with millions of followers, known for "patriotic" posts and viral bikini ice fishing content, has been revealed to be an Indian man who used Gemini AI to create the persona that paid for med school. (WIRED) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046782948548989293/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位拥有数百万粉丝的 MAGA 网红，以“爱国”帖子和病毒式传播的比基尼冰钓内容而闻名，被揭露其实是一名印度男子，他利用 Gemini AI 创建了这个用来支付医学院学费的人设。（WIRED）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046782948548989293/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 EU Foreign Minister Kallas reports that no unanimous agreement was reached on partially suspending the EU Association Agreement with Israel. "Now on the relations with Israel. Some Member States today proposed a full or partial suspension of the EU Association Agreement, as well as for restrictions on trade coming from settlement, and others were expressing their opposition to such proposals. Given that the suspension of the Association Agreement needs anonymity, there was no support for this needed in the room. And the measures that we have already on the table that require a qualified majority will require states shifting their position. We didn't see that today, but these discussions will continue." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇱 欧盟外交与安全政策高级代表卡拉斯报告称，关于部分暂停欧盟与以色列联系国协定一事，各方未能达成一致。“关于与以色列的关系。今天一些成员国提议全面或部分暂停欧盟与以色列的联系国协定，并对来自定居点的贸易实施限制，而其他成员国则表达了反对意见。鉴于暂停联系国协定需要一致同意，会议室内并未对此达成所需的支持。而我们目前已有的需要特定多数票通过的措施，将需要各国转变立场。我们今天没有看到这种情况，但这些讨论将会继续。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇰🇿 🇷🇺 Reuters: Russia is set to stop oil exports from Kazakhstan to Germany via the Druzhba pipeline starting from May 1. Kazakhstan's oil exports to Germany via the Druzhba pipeline totalled 2.146 million metric tons in 2025, and a complete halt would remove about 17% of the oil processed by Germany's PCK refinery. Kremlin spokesman Peskov said he was not aware of the decision but told reports that he will try to "check it." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇰🇿 🇷🇺 路透社：俄罗斯计划从 5 月 1 日起停止通过友谊输油管道（Druzhba pipeline）向德国出口哈萨克斯坦石油。2025 年，哈萨克斯坦通过友谊输油管道向德国出口的石油总量为 214.6 万公吨，完全停止出口将导致德国 PCK 炼油厂约 17% 的石油加工量受到影响。克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫表示他并不知晓这一决定，但告诉记者他会尝试“核实一下”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Fox: The extended ceasefire with Iran will end shortly if no agreement is reached. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 福克斯新闻：如果无法达成协议，与伊朗的延长停火协议即将结束。 @wfwitness

text: 🐻 Here's all the key news of the past 24 hours: ➡️ Cuba’s foreign ministry has confirmed reports about a recent meeting between the Cuban and American delegations ➡️ LPR has been liberated, the offensive is proceeding in all directions, Russia's Cheif of General Staff reports ➡️ Construction of the automobile bridge between North Korea and Russia is almost complete ➡️ Ukraine's SBU special forces have carried out an armed detention operation against the TCC in Odessa ➡️ Dmitry Medvedev gives his opinion on whether the US would help Europe if there's a war with Russia ➡️ Trump "expects to be bombing" Iran - but also expects a deal . Doesn't look like Iran is interested though ➡️ Trump announces that the US is continuing the blockade and extends the ceasefire, and Iran issues a warning ➡️ Scott Bessent promises "economic fury" ➡️ Putin comments on the outcome of the SMO ➡️ Russia strikes the home of "Flash" — a adviser to Ukraine's Defense Minister and specialist in electronic reconnaissance ➡️ The leader of Yemen's Ansar Allah says they will not remain neutral against any aggression towards Iran ➡️ FBI Director Kash Patel defends himself against allegations published by The Atlantic ➡️ Maria Zakharova calls out Netanyahu 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 以下是过去24小时的所有关键新闻： ➡️ 古巴外交部证实了有关古巴和美国代表团最近举行会晤的报道 ➡️ 俄罗斯总参谋长报告称，卢甘斯克人民共和国（LPR）已获解放，进攻正在全线推进 ➡️ 朝鲜与俄罗斯之间的公路桥建设即将完工 ➡️ 乌克兰国家安全局（SBU）特种部队在敖德萨对乌克兰领土征兵中心（TCC）进行了武装拘留行动 ➡️ 德米特里·梅德韦杰夫就美国在与俄罗斯发生战争时是否会帮助欧洲发表了看法 ➡️ 特朗普“预计会轰炸”伊朗——但也预计会达成协议。不过看起来伊朗对此并不感兴趣 ➡️ 特朗普宣布美国将继续封锁并延长停火协议，伊朗发出警告 ➡️ 斯科特·贝森特承诺将带来“经济风暴” ➡️ 普京评论特别军事行动（SMO）的结果 ➡️ 俄罗斯袭击了乌克兰国防部长顾问、“闪电”电子侦察专家住所 ➡️ 也门胡塞武装领导人表示，他们不会对任何针对伊朗的侵略行为保持中立 ➡️ 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔为自己辩护，反驳《大西洋月刊》发表的指控 ➡️ 玛丽亚·扎哈罗娃点名批评内塔尼亚胡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN: Top U.S. officials believe that the reason Iran didn't respond to the U.S. proposal is because of fractures within the Iranian government. "And the president's top aides basically believe one of the biggest reasons they did not hear back from…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: U.S. officials still believe that there's still a chance that U.S. and Iranian negotiators can meet again soon, despite Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei beinh hidden disrupting internal Iranian discussions. "The US believes that Khamenei's efforts to remain hidden have actually disrupted internal Iranian government discussions. Now as we sit here tonight, the president has extended this ceasefire. There is no end date as you noticed on that truth social post. No new deadline on how long this could go on. Despite our reporting tonight about the concerns about what's happening inside the Iranian government, I am told that US officials do believe there is still a chance that The US and Iranian negotiators could meet again soon. But if and when that happens, it's far from certain tonight." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN：美国高级官员认为，伊朗没有回应美国提议的原因是伊朗政府内部存在分歧。“总统的高级助手们基本上认为，他们没有收到伊朗方面回复的最大原因之一是……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：美国官员仍然认为，尽管伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊（Mojtaba Khamenei）躲藏起来干扰了伊朗内部讨论，但美伊谈判代表仍有可能很快再次会面。“美国认为，哈梅内伊试图保持隐匿的行为实际上扰乱了伊朗政府内部的讨论。现在我们今晚坐在这里，总统已经延长了停火协议。正如你在那篇Truth Social帖子中注意到的那样，没有结束日期。对于这种情况能持续多久没有新的最后期限。尽管我们今晚报道了对伊朗政府内部所发生事情的担忧，但我被告知美国官员确实认为美伊谈判代表仍有可能很快再次会面。但如果这种情况发生，何时发生，今晚还远未确定。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN: The U.S. had sent Iran a list of points to agree to in order to hold another round of negotiations, however, as U.S. Vice President Vance prepared to fly to Pakistan they had still not received a response from Iran. "I've learned that in recent…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: Top U.S. officials believe that the reason Iran didn't respond to the U.S. proposal is because of fractures within the Iranian government. "And the president's top aides basically believe one of the biggest reasons they did not hear back from the Iranians on what they wanted to just get these talks started is due to fractures within the current Iranian leadership. The administration sense that the Iranians don't have consensus on their position or how know how much to empower the people who are going and negotiating in person on things like uranium enrichment and the current stockpile of enriched uranium. A part of that complicating factor, The United States believes, is whether or not the Sunni supreme leader, Majdaba Khamenei, is giving his subordinates clear directions or if they're simply having to assess and guess what he wants without specific instruction from him while he's been in hiding. That's something that the president was alluding to in his truth social post about extending the ceasefire today." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN：美国曾向伊朗发送了一份需要同意的要点清单，以便举行新一轮谈判，然而，当美国副总统万斯准备飞往巴基斯坦时，他们仍未收到伊朗的回应。“我了解到，最近……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：美国高级官员认为，伊朗没有回应美国提议的原因是伊朗政府内部存在分歧。“总统的高级助手们基本上认为，他们没有收到伊朗方面关于如何启动这些谈判的回复，最大的原因之一是当前伊朗领导层内部存在分歧。政府感觉到伊朗人在他们的立场上没有达成共识，或者不知道该赋予那些亲自去谈判铀浓缩和当前浓缩铀库存等问题的人多大的权力。美国认为，造成这一复杂因素的部分原因是，逊尼派最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊是否在给予下属明确指示，还是他们仅仅是在他躲藏期间，在没有他具体指示的情况下评估和猜测他想要什么。这就是总统今天在Truth Social帖子中提到延长停火协议时所暗示的内容。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: The U.S. had sent Iran a list of points to agree to in order to hold another round of negotiations, however, as U.S. Vice President Vance prepared to fly to Pakistan they had still not received a response from Iran. "I've learned that in recent days, The United States had sent Iran a list of broad points that they wanted them to agree to in advance of the next round of talks of JD Vance getting on air force two and going back to Islamabad. But days went by without The United States getting a response, raising questions and suspicions about whether or not much could be achieved in person. Officials had urged the top mediator from Pakistan to get at least some kind of response from Iran before the vice president boarded his flight. But still, hours later, an official tells me there was nothing." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：美国曾向伊朗发送了一份需要同意的要点清单，以便举行新一轮谈判，然而，就在美国副总统万斯准备飞往巴基斯坦时，他们仍未收到伊朗的回应。“我了解到，最近几天，美国向伊朗发送了一份广泛的要点清单，希望他们在JD·万斯登上空军二号并返回伊斯兰堡进行下一轮会谈之前同意这些要点。但几天过去了，美国仍未得到回应，这引发了人们对能否通过面对面会谈取得实质性成果的质疑和怀疑。官员们曾敦促巴基斯坦的最高调解人在副总统登机前至少从伊朗那里得到某种回应。但几个小时后，一位官员告诉我，仍然没有任何消息。” @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Latest Trump post: Iran doesn't want the Strait of Hormuz closed, they want it open so they can make $500 Million Dollars a day (which is, therefore, what they are losing if it is closed!). People approached me four days ago, saying, "Sir, Iran wants to open up the Strait, immediately." But if we do that, there can never be a Deal with Iran, unless we blow up the rest of their Country, their leaders included! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet

text: Open Source Intel RT @SecScottBessent : As @POTUS has made clear, the United States Navy will continue the blockade of Iranian ports. In a matter of days, Kharg Island storage will be full and the fragile Iranian oil wells will be shut in. Constraining Iran’s maritime trade directly targets the regime’s primary revenue lifelines. The @USTreasury will continue to apply maximum pressure through Economic Fury to systematically degrade Tehran’s ability to generate, move, and repatriate funds. Any person or vessel facilitating these flows—through covert trade and finance—risks exposure to U.S. sanctions. We continue to freeze the funds stolen by the corrupt leadership on behalf of the people of Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转发 @SecScottBessent：正如 @POTUS 所明确表示的那样，美国海军将继续封锁伊朗港口。几天之内，哈尔克岛的储油设施就会装满，脆弱的伊朗油井将被关闭。限制伊朗的海上贸易直接打击了该政权的主要收入生命线。@USTreasury 将继续通过“经济愤怒”施加最大压力，系统性地削弱德黑兰产生、转移和汇回资金的能力。任何通过秘密贸易和金融协助这些资金流动的个人或船只，都面临遭受美国制裁的风险。我们继续冻结腐败领导层窃取的代表伊朗人民的资金。推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 I'm not an expert on this topic, but I can confirm that the weather changed immediately after Iran destroyed US radars in the UAE at the start of the war. Dried-up lakes, including the famous Urmia Lake, revived after decades of drought, and we are experiencing many rainy days like the good old days (decades ago), many dams are overflowing. I'm not sure if there is a connection or just coincidence, but we are clearly seeing signs. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 我不是这个话题的专家，但我可以确认，在战争初期伊朗摧毁阿联酋的美国雷达后，天气立即发生了变化。包括著名的乌尔米耶湖在内的干涸湖泊在经历了数十年的干旱后复苏了，我们正在经历许多像过去（几十年前）那样的多雨日子，许多水坝都溢出了。我不确定这之间是否有联系，还是仅仅是巧合，但我们显然看到了迹象。🚩 抵抗战壕 | 助力
